extraction.one_line_summary: CONTADOR attacked on the final climb of Alto de l'Angliru in his career finale, catching and dropping breakaway while Sky controlled GC group behind.
tactical_patterns: Contador attacked l'Angliru final climb on last mountain stage of career, catching two-minute breakaway solo through superior climbing.
Sky controlled peloton pace despite wet dangerous roads; Froome maintained GC with Poels support two kilometers from summit.
Zakarin and de la Cruz crashed in wet final kilometers, demonstrating peril of aggressive descending before decisive climb.

rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: positive: attacked l'Angliru on final career mountain stage, caught 2-minute breakaway solo, showing exceptional third-week form despite GC deficit
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: fell back 2km from l'Angliru summit, losing podium fight despite being second overall entering stage
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: defended red jersey with Poels support on l'Angliru, showing Sky's controlled approach even on difficult wet roads
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: neutral: crashed in wet final kilometers but maintained third overall, demonstrating resilience despite mishap
